name: Kayah State (Myanmar)
description: A red field charged at the centre with the emblem of Kayah State.
history: Used by the Kayah State government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the flag of Kayah State, with the Kayah/Karenni state emblem at the centre, surrounded by colour bands
